_comment: Dataverse-style engagement tracker for Meridian's portfolio. This is the create_entity / update_entity / fetch write target for the 'Agent with MCP / Tools' tier (the change-request hero action). Rows have stable ids; writes append or patch here at runtime (in-memory unless persisted).
